collection.name: Child of Alara
collection.description: Trample, When Child of Alara dies, destroy all nonland permanents. They can't be regenerated.
collection.flavor_text: Some say Miku was born of music. Others think she is harmony incarnate.

card.name: Child of Alara
card.description: Trample, When Child of Alara dies, destroy all nonland permanents. They can't be regenerated.
card.flavor_text: Some say Miku was born of music. Others think she is harmony incarnate.

card.name: Bolas's Citadel
card.description: You may look at the top card of your library any time. You may play lands and cast spells from the top of your library. If you cast a spell this way, pay life equal to its mana value rather than pay its mana cost. {T}, Sacrifice ten nonland permanents: Each opponent loses 10 life.
